strategy_summary: The binary is a 64-bit ELF with full RELRO, NX, and no PIE. The main vulnerability seems to be in the format string handling. We can use the printf function to leak libc addresses and then overwrite a GOT entry (e.g., puts) with the address of system. We will need to measure the offset for the format string vulnerability and find a way to control the stack to leak and overwrite the GOT entries.
